name: TableOfContents.story
visual_summary: TableOfContents.story is a table of contents story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready table component with the following characteristics:

Name: TableOfContents.story
Description: TableOfContents.story is a table of contents story UI component from the mantine corpus. It provides reusable table behavior and styling for React or web UI screens.
Style: 
Interactions: 
Tags: contents, mantine, of, story, table

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
Reference implementation (adapt don't copy):
